rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0010
rows.name: Good grief[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0020
rows.name: I've been put through the wringer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well, if you weren't flesh and blood,
we wouldn't have had such a hard time either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: xs31170100_SEL0010
rows.name: Ask if he means "flesh and blood" as in a real body.

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0040
rows.name: That's right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0050
rows.name: He's not a [System:Ruby rt=Blue Blood ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby], he's flesh and blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_JNK0020
rows.name: Nitpick

rows.label: xs31170100_SEL0020
rows.name: Point out that [System:Ruby rt=Blue Bloods ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby] are not flesh and blood.

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0060
rows.name: Right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0070
rows.name: He's not a [System:Ruby rt=Blue Blood ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby], he's flesh and blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0090
rows.name: You thought all crew members were [System:Ruby rt=Blue Bloods ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby], didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0100
rows.name: But this guy,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0105
rows.name: he's what you'd call a chosen one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0110
rows.name: The original Ares...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0120
rows.name: requires a living body to pilot it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0130
rows.name: You guys,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0140
rows.name: we can drop that subject for now, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0150
rows.name: More importantly, once again[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0160
rows.name: Welcome back, Al.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0170
rows.name: We are truly overjoyed at the return of our hero.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0190
rows.name: Could you drop the whole "hero" thing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0200
rows.name: I don't even know what kind of face to make.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0210
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―More importantly,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0220
rows.name: I want to hear about this planet, and everything that's happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0230
rows.name: Right now, I still feel like a time traveler.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0240
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0250
rows.name: I will explain things in order.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0260
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0270
rows.name: I have a general grasp of the events since I've been gone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0280
rows.name: In that case[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0290
rows.name: It's our turn to ask questions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0300
rows.name: Al[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0310
rows.name: Where exactly have you been all this time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0320
rows.name: To talk about that,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0330
rows.name: I need the results of the Ares's analysis.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0340
rows.name: Without proof, it's a completely unbelievable story.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0350
rows.name: What do you mean by that...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0390
rows.name: Rapid energy increase detected in the vicinity of Shiraki no Tairiku![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0400
rows.name: A disappearance phenomenon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0410
rows.name: No.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0420
rows.name: It doesn't match the pattern of a disappearance phenomenon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0430
rows.name: Tch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0440
rows.name: It's just one thing after another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31170100_MSG0450
rows.name: Put it on the monitor.[ST:wait ]
